name: brand-voice
description: Your brand sounds different in every email, social post, and landing page because there's no written guide. Paste 5-10 samples of your best content and get back a complete brand voice guide: tone dimensions, vocabulary rules, do's and don'ts, and before/after rewrites showing your voice applied consistently.
tagline: Extract your brand voice into a guide anyone can follow

skills.name: extract-voice
skills.description: Analyze content samples and generate a brand voice guide

outputDescription: A complete brand voice guide with tone dimensions, vocabulary rules, do's and don'ts, before/after rewrites, and platform-specific adaptations.
